bodyHtml:
研究对象: TALEN

TALEN 财务数据复核

口径说明

本报告仅覆盖研究对象 TALEN；公开交易代码为 TLN，公司 2025 Form 10-K 披露的报表单位为 million of dollars，三年损益表覆盖 2025 年、2024 年、2023 年 5 月 18 日至 2023 年 12 月 31 日 Successor 期间，以及 2023 年 1 月 1 日至 2023 年 5 月 17 日 Predecessor 期间。[S1] 2023 年收入、净利润、Energy Expenses、经营现金流为两段期间相加的经营趋势口径，因 fresh-start accounting 不等同于单一 GAAP 年度。[自测算：2023 年合计 = 2023-01-01 至 2023-05-17 Predecessor + 2023-05-18 至 2023-12-31 Successor，输入来自 S1]

三年收入、净利润与利润率趋势

毛利率采用独立发电商可比口径：近似毛利率 = (Operating Revenues - Energy Expenses) / Operating Revenues；Energy Expenses 包括 Fuel and energy purchases、Nuclear fuel amortization 与衍生品相关 Energy expenses。[S1]

年度 Operating Revenues Net Income (Loss) Attributable to Stockholders / Member Energy Expenses 近似毛利率 净利率 主要解释
2023 合计 $2,554 million [自测算：,210 million + ,344 million，S1] $613 million [自测算：$479 million + 34 million，S1] $867 million [自测算：$332 million + $535 million，S1] 66.1% [自测算：($2,554 million - $867 million) / $2,554 million] 24.0% [自测算：$613 million / $2,554 million] 2023 年包含 $799 million Reorganization income [S1]，利润率不可视作正常化水平。
2024 $2,115 million [S1] $998 million [S1] $797 million [S1] 62.3% [自测算：($2,115 million - $797 million) / $2,115 million] 47.2% [自测算：$998 million / $2,115 million] 2024 年包含 $884 million Gain on sale of assets [S1]，GAAP 净利率显著抬升。
2025 $2,581 million [S1] $(219) million [S1] ,066 million [S1] 58.7% [自测算：($2,581 million - ,066 million) / $2,581 million] 8.5% [自测算：$(219) million / $2,581 million] 2025 年收入上升至 $2,581 million [S1]，但 General and administrative expense 为 $(624) million [S1]，其中 stock-based compensation 为 $(526) million [S1]，拖累 GAAP 利润。

ROE / ROA / ROIC 分析

ROE = 归母净利润 / 平均归母权益；ROA = 归母净利润 / 平均总资产；ROIC = Operating Income (Loss) * (1 - 21%) / 平均投入资本，投入资本 = DebtInstrumentCarryingAmount + StockholdersEquity - CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue。[自测算：公式；21% federal statutory income tax rate 见 S1] 2023 年回报率仅采用 2023 年 5 月 18 日至 2023 年 12 月 31 日 Successor 期间，不年化。[自测算：期间口径来自 S1]

年度 归母净利润 / Operating Income 平均权益 / 平均资产 / 平均投入资本 ROE ROA ROIC 判断
2023 Successor 归母净利润 34 million；Operating Income 60 million [S1] 平均权益 $2,389 million；平均资产 $7,090 million；平均投入资本 $4,952 million [自测算：输入为 2023-05-17 与 2023-12-31 资产负债表项目，S1] 5.6% [自测算：34 million / $2,389 million] 1.9% [自测算：34 million / $7,090 million] 2.6% [自测算：60 million * (1 - 21%) / $4,952 million] 重组后短期间口径，方向性参考价值高于绝对值。
2024 归母净利润 $998 million；Operating Income $226 million [S1] 平均权益 ,922 million；平均资产 $6,614 million；平均投入资本 $4,502 million [自测算：输入为 2023-12-31 与 2024-12-31 资产负债表项目，S1] 51.9% [自测算：$998 million / ,922 million] 15.1% [自测算：$998 million / $6,614 million] 4.0% [自测算：$226 million * (1 - 21%) / $4,502 million] ROE/ROA 主要受 $884 million 资产出售收益放大 [S1]，ROIC 更接近经营真实水平。
2025 归母净利润 $(219) million；Operating Income $(90) million [S1] 平均权益 ,240 million；平均资产 $8,506 million；平均投入资本 $5,706 million [自测算：输入为 2024-12-31 与 2025-12-31 资产负债表项目，S1] 17.7% [自测算：$(219) million / ,240 million] 2.6% [自测算：$(219) million / $8,506 million] 1.2% [自测算：$(90) million * (1 - 21%) / $5,706 million] GAAP 回报率转负，但主要受 2025 年费用重分类、股权激励和交易相关事项影响；不改变对 th_T01 的方向性确认。

杠杆与偿债指标

年度末 总债务 现金及现金等价物 净债务 归母权益 总资产 总债务 / 权益 总债务 / 总资本 流动比率 EBIT / Interest 结论
2023-12-31 $2,849 million [S1] $400 million [S1] $2,449 million [自测算：$2,849 million - $400 million] $2,457 million [S1] $7,121 million [S1] 1.16x [自测算：$2,849 million / $2,457 million] 53.7% [自测算：$2,849 million / ($2,849 million + $2,457 million)] 3.20x [自测算：,554 million / $486 million，S1] 0.25x [自测算：$84 million / $339 million，S1] 重组后流动性充足，但经营利息覆盖偏低。
2024-12-31 $3,038 million [S1] $328 million [S1] $2,710 million [自测算：$3,038 million - $328 million] ,387 million [S1] $6,106 million [S1] 2.19x [自测算：$3,038 million / ,387 million] 68.7% [自测算：$3,038 million / ($3,038 million + ,387 million)] 2.29x [自测算：,040 million / $455 million，S1] 0.95x [自测算：$226 million / $238 million，S1] 回购和资产组合变化后权益基数下降，账面杠杆上升。
2025-12-31 $6,911 million [S1] $689 million [S1] $6,222 million [自测算：$6,911 million - $689 million] ,093 million [S1] 0,905 million [S1] 6.32x [自测算：$6,911 million / ,093 million] 86.3% [自测算：$6,911 million / ($6,911 million + ,093 million)] 1.28x [自测算：,349 million / ,050 million，S1] 0.30x [自测算：$(90) million / $302 million，S1] 收购融资后账面杠杆明显抬升，偿债能力更依赖 2026 年后 EBITDA 兑现。

现金流质量

年度 Net Cash Provided by Operating Activities 归母净利润 OCF / 归母净利润 OCF / Operating Revenues 现金流质量判断
2023 合计 $864 million [自测算：$462 million + $402 million，S1] $613 million [自测算：$479 million + 34 million，S1] 1.41x [自测算：$864 million / $613 million] 33.8% [自测算：$864 million / $2,554 million] 经营现金流覆盖净利润，但 2023 年受重组和 fresh-start accounting 影响。
2024 $256 million [S1] $998 million [S1] 0.26x [自测算：$256 million / $998 million] 12.1% [自测算：$256 million / $2,115 million] 净利润质量偏低，因 $884 million 资产出售收益 [S1] 抬高利润而非经营现金流。
2025 $704 million [S1] $(219) million [S1] 3.21x [自测算：$704 million / $(219) million] 27.3% [自测算：$704 million / $2,581 million] GAAP 亏损但经营现金流为正，说明会计亏损与现金创造能力背离。

关键财务指标与行业均值对比

行业均值采用 NYU Stern / Aswath Damodaran 的 U.S. Utility (General) 口径，样本公司数为 14 家，数据更新口径为 January 2026。[S2][S3][S4][S5]

指标 TALEN 2025 Utility (General) 行业均值 差异 解读
毛利率 / Gross Margin 58.7% [自测算：($2,581 million - ,066 million) / $2,581 million，S1] 44.18% [S2] +14.5 pct [自测算：58.7% - 44.18%] TALEN 核电和批发电力组合的能源成本扣除后毛利率高于行业。[S1]
净利率 / Net Margin 8.5% [自测算：$(219) million / $2,581 million，S1] 14.18% [S2] 22.7 pct [自测算：-8.5% - 14.18%] 2025 年 GAAP 净亏损使净利率低于行业。
ROE 17.7% [自测算：$(219) million / ,240 million，S1] 10.42% [S3] 28.1 pct [自测算：-17.7% - 10.42%] 权益回报低于行业，短期受费用与资本结构影响。
ROIC / ROC 1.2% [自测算：$(90) million * (1 - 21%) / $5,706 million，S1] 5.99% [S4] 7.2 pct [自测算：-1.2% - 5.99%] GAAP Operating Income 为负，经营投入资本回报暂时低于行业。
Book Debt to Capital 86.3% [自测算：$6,911 million / ($6,911 million + ,093 million)，S1] 57.87% [S5] +28.4 pct [自测算：86.3% - 57.87%] 收购融资后账面杠杆高于 Utility (General) 平均。[S1]
Interest Coverage Ratio 0.30x [自测算：$(90) million / $302 million，S1] 2.57x [S5] 2.87x [自测算：-0.30x - 2.57x] 2025 年 GAAP EBIT 为负，利息覆盖弱于行业。

结论与机构观点关系

财务数据确认而非推翻 th_T01：TALEN 2025 年 Operating Revenues 增至 $2,581 million [S1]、OCF 为 $704 million [S1]，显示电力资产现金流仍有支撑；但 2025 年总债务升至 $6,911 million [S1]、Book Debt to Capital 升至 86.3% [自测算]，说明 th_p_a4491fea 所强调的监管、燃料和资本结构摩擦会通过杠杆与利息覆盖放大。结论不改变机构对 TALEN long 的 stance direction，也不改变 high conviction，但应把后续 EBITDA 兑现和去杠杆速度列为核心跟踪项。

资料来源 / Sources

[S1] SEC, Talen Energy Corporation Form 10-K for fiscal year ended December 31, 2025 — https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1622536/000162253626000017/tln-20251231.htm

[S2] NYU Stern / Aswath Damodaran, Operating and Net Margins by Sector (US) — https://pages.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar/New_Home_Page/datafile/margin.html

[S3] NYU Stern / Aswath Damodaran, Return on Equity by Sector (US) — https://pages.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar/New_Home_Page/datafile/roe.html

[S4] NYU Stern / Aswath Damodaran, Return on Capital by Sector (US) — https://pages.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar/New_Home_Page/datafile/roc.html

[S5] NYU Stern / Aswath Damodaran, Debt Fundamentals by Sector (US) — https://pages.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar/New_Home_Page/datafile/dbtfund.html
